title: Toornament Participant
description: Schema for a Toornament tournament participant (player or team).

tournament_id.description: ID of the tournament this participant belongs to.

name.description: Participant name — player username or team name.

type.description: Whether this is a team or individual player.

checked_in.description: Whether the participant has completed check-in.

username.description: In-game username of the team member.

custom_fields.description: Key-value pairs of custom registration field values.

created_at.description: When the participant was added to the tournament.
